---
title: "LX / tech: annotations"
bibliography: LXtech.bib
#nocite: '@pethes_war_2006'
# tables:
#   - tbl_qa: {file: "qa.qmd", num: 1}
#   - tbl-summary: {file: "results.qmd", num: 2}
title-meta: ""
date: '`r format(Sys.time())`'

---


## notes on papers 

### snc
- t1

{{< include _setup.qmd >}}

```{r}
#| label: tbl_qa1
#| tbl-cap: "wiener_kybernetik_1992: annotations"
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| eval: true

qa1<-list(LXtech=c("Zinsmeister 2013.pdf","Frankowsky_2022.pdf"))
qa1<-list(LXtech=qa$LXtech)
#qa1


```


{{< include _vars.qmd >}}
